name: Pizzeria
tagline: A six-context pizza shop: menu, ordering, kitchen, delivery, payment and promotions.
description: The flagship realistic Koine domain. Six bounded contexts model a working pizzeria end to end. Menu is the upstream catalogue of pizzas, sizes and toppings, owning the shared-kernel Currency and rich Money/Topping value objects. Ordering is the heart of the template: an Order aggregate priced from its OrderLine line items, with an explicit lifecycle state machine, place/cancel commands, and an OrderPlaced integration event that Kitchen, Delivery and Payment all subscribe to. Kitchen runs each order through a ticket workflow (queued → prepping → baking → ready → served), Delivery enforces that a delivery order must carry an address, Payment shields itself from a third-party card gateway with an anti-corruption layer that translates the raw gateway result into a clean PaymentReceipt and posts captures to a ledger via a cross-aggregate policy, and Promotions enforces that a discount can never drive an order total negative. The context map wires the six contexts together with every relationship kind — shared-kernel, conformist, customer-supplier, partnership, open-host, and anti-corruption-layer.
teaches: modelling a non-trivial domain across six bounded contexts
an aggregate priced from its line items with derived/computed fields
entity lifecycle state machines guarded by invariants
commands that guard with requires and emit domain events
integration events published to and subscribed by other contexts
an anti-corruption layer translating a third-party model
a cross-aggregate policy reacting to a domain event
natural-key identity, versioned aggregates, and repositories with finders
value objects, quantities with unit-checked arithmetic, and invariants
named specifications and pure domain operations
modules, @since contract versioning, read models and queries
a context map exercising every strategic relationship kind
